title: Bridge Essay: Brain Networks, Neurotransmitters and Psychedelics: Towards a Neurochemistry of Self-Awareness.
concept: Psychedelics — DMN disruption, ego dissolution, altered states, predictive processing decoupling.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nonordinary Rendering** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Psychedelics — DMN disruption, ego dissolution, altered states, predictive processing decoupling.

**Brain Networks, Neurotransmitters and Psychedelics: Towards a Neurochemistry of Self-Awareness.** - Curr Neurol Neurosci Rep (2024). DOI: 10.1007/s11910-024-01353-y. PMID: 38980658. PURPOSE OF REVIEW: Self-awareness can be defined as the capacity of becoming the object of one's own awareness and, increasingly, it has been the target of scientific inquiry. Self-awareness has important clinical implications, and a better understanding of the neurochemical basis of self-awareness may help clarifying causes and developing interventions for different psychopathological conditions.
